name: Hominy & Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Place pork in a 10-12 inch frying pan; cover tightly. Cook over medium heat for 20 minutes.
2. Uncover; cook over high heat, turning pork occasionally until liquid evaporates and meat browns, 5-10 minutes. Drain off fat.
3. Add broth, carrots, and hominy. Cover and simmer until meat is tender when pierced, 20-25 minutes.
4. Transfer pork and hominy mixture to a platter; top with pink pickled onions and parsley. Add salt and pepper to taste.
PINK PICKLED ONIONS
1. Thinly slice onion (use 1 medium red onion).
2. Mix onion with vinegar, sugar, and water.
3. Cover and chill for 30 minutes to 1 hour.
4. Drain before using.
